citation: Law on Advertising No. 16/2012/QH13 — Articles 8, 9 (Truthfulness and prohibited misleading content)
summary: Advertising must be truthful and must not use unsubstantiated absolute or superlative performance claims that mislead consumers.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Absolute efficacy, superiority, or best-in-class claims (Vietnamese or English). ACTION: WARN for VN scope — require substantiation; do not auto-BLOCK without legal review. CHECK: Test data, scope, and claim wording in Vietnamese. ESCALATE IF: Medical or therapeutic absolute claims.
